summary: Sidebar Restructure, CRM Consolidation, and Partnerships Domain - All tests pass. Verified sidebar groups (Sales, Operations, Finance, Catalog, Partnerships, Settings), CRM 6-tab consolidation, and Partnerships routes.

console_warnings.issue: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - some service leads have null IDs

critical_code_review_comments: Service leads with null IDs cause React key warnings - consider using index or unique identifier fallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar restructure complete. Verified: (1) Sidebar has 6 groups: Sales (CRM, Quotes, Customers), Operations (Orders, Requests Inbox, Deliveries), Finance (Payments Queue, Invoices), Catalog (Products & Services), Partnerships (Affiliates, Referrals, Commissions), Settings (Business Settings, Users, Help). (2) CRM page has 6 tabs: All Leads, Service Leads, Product Leads, Request Conversions, Pipeline, Intelligence. (3) Service Leads and CRM Intelligence are NOT standalone sidebar items. (4) Partnerships routes work: /admin/partnerships/affiliates loads Affiliates page, /admin/partnerships/referrals and /admin/partnerships/commissions show Coming Soon placeholder. (5) Lead drawer works when clicking lead rows. (6) Backend APIs all working: /api/partnerships/summary, /api/admin/crm-intelligence/dashboard, /api/admin-flow-fixes/sales/service-leads, /api/admin/sales-kpis/summary, /api/admin/marketing-performance/sources.

SIDEBAR_STRUCTURE.details: 6 groups verified: Sales, Operations, Finance, Catalog, Partnerships, Settings

CRM_SINGLE_ENTRY.details: Only one CRM entry under Sales group (not CRM Pipeline)

SERVICE_LEADS_NOT_STANDALONE.details: Service Leads is NOT a standalone sidebar item

CRM_INTELLIGENCE_NOT_STANDALONE.details: CRM Intelligence is NOT a standalone sidebar item

AFFILIATES_UNDER_PARTNERSHIPS.details: Affiliates is under Partnerships group, NOT Operations

NO_DUPLICATE_PRODUCTS.details: Only 'Products & Services' exists under Catalog, no duplicate 'Products'

PARTNERSHIPS_GROUP.details: Partnerships group exists with Affiliates, Referrals, Commissions

CRM_6_TABS.details: CRM page has 6 tabs: All Leads, Service Leads, Product Leads, Request Conversions, Pipeline, Intelligence

CRM_ALL_LEADS_TAB.details: All Leads tab shows lead table with data

CRM_SERVICE_LEADS_TAB.details: Service Leads tab loads and displays service leads data

CRM_INTELLIGENCE_TAB.details: Intelligence tab shows dashboard with Total Leads, Won, Lost, Sales Summary, Pipeline by Stage, Lead Sources, Marketing Source Performance

CRM_PIPELINE_TAB.details: Pipeline tab shows Kanban board view with columns: New, Contacted, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Won, Lost

CRM_LEAD_DRAWER.details: Lead drawer opens when clicking lead row, shows lead details, timeline, add note, schedule follow-up, update stage

PARTNERSHIPS_AFFILIATES_PAGE.details: Affiliates page loads at /admin/partnerships/affiliates with create form and partners list

PARTNERSHIPS_REFERRALS_COMING_SOON.details: Referrals shows Coming Soon page at /admin/partnerships/referrals

PARTNERSHIPS_COMMISSIONS_COMING_SOON.details: Commissions shows Coming Soon page at /admin/partnerships/commissions

BACKEND_PARTNERSHIPS_API.details: GET /api/partnerships/summary returns affiliates count, referrals count, pending_commissions, paid_out

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is MOCKED - logged to email_logs collection, not actually dispatched
